meta.title: Pigia Kura kwa Palestina
meta.description: Onyesha msaada wako kwa Palestina. Tambua dola ya Palestina, simamisha uuzaji wa silaha, simamisha uwekezaji haramu.

home.heroSubtitle: Dai hatua. Kwa siri, kwa usalama, na chini ya dakika moja.
home.tagline: Show the politicians what you think — anonymously and in under one minute
home.anonText: Nambari yako ya simu imefichwa kwa hashing ya njia moja. Hakuna mtu anayeweza kuona ni nani aliyepigia kura.
home.privacyVote: Your phone number is encrypted with a one-way algorithm (SHA-256) and cannot be reconstructed. We store no IP addresses or personal data.
home.privacyInvite: Invitations are sent directly from our server — the recipient cannot see who sent it.
home.voteOnPhoneHint: Unachagua Ndiyo/Hapana unapofungua kiungo kwenye simu yako.
home.intro: Hapa wapiga kura wanaweza kuwaonyesha wanasiasa wanachokifikiri — na wagombea wanaweza kuwaonyesha wapiga kura msimamo wao. Huwezi kuona msimamo wa mgombea wako? Mwambie atoe maoni yake hapa.

candidates.title: Wagombea
candidates.subtitle: Kuwa mgombea wa kwanza kusimama kwa madai matatu.
candidates.emptyText: Kuwa mgombea wa kwanza kuunga mkono madai matatu hadharani.

about.title: Kuhusu Pigia Kura kwa Palestina
about.whatTitle: Pigia Kura kwa Palestina ni nini?
about.whatText: Pigia Kura kwa Palestina ni jukwaa la kiraia ambapo unaweza kuonyesha msaada wako kwa siri kwa madai matatu mahususi: kutambuliwa kwa dola ya Palestina, kusimamishwa kwa uuzaji wa silaha kwa Israel, na kukomesha uwekezaji haramu katika uvamizi.
about.howIntro: Tunachukulia usiri wako kwa uzito mkubwa. Hivi ndivyo inavyofanya kazi:
about.howStep1Text: Ingiza nambari yako ya simu na upokee karatasi ya kura kupitia SMS yenye kiungo cha kipekee.
about.howStep2Text: Fungua kiungo na pigia kura ndio au hapana kwa madai matatu. Nambari yako ya simu imefichwa kwa algorithm ya njia moja ili isiweze kurudishwa.
about.howStep3Text: Kila nambari ya simu inaweza kupigia kura mara moja tu. Karatasi ya kura inaisha baada ya saa 24.
about.howPrivacy: Hatuhifadhi anwani za IP, vidakuzi, wala data yoyote binafsi inayohusiana na kura.
about.bundleText: Ili kulinda wapiga kura wa mapema, jumla ya kura inaonyeshwa tu baada ya kufikia angalau 50. Kabla ya hapo, hali ya ukusanyaji tu ndio inayoonyeshwa.
about.security1: Hashing ya SHA-256 ya nambari za simu na chumvi ya upande wa seva
about.security2: Tokeni za karatasi ya kura zenye muda wa kuisha wa saa 24
about.security3: Kikomo cha kasi kwenye vituo vyote
about.security4: Upeo wa karatasi 3 zinazosubiri kwa kifaa
about.security5: Hakuna ufuatiliaji au uchambuzi wa wahusika wengine
about.cryptoP1: When you vote, our server combines your phone number with a secret key (a "salt"). This combination is run through SHA-256 — a cryptographic one-way function. The result is a 64-character fingerprint (a "hash") that we store instead of your phone number.
about.cryptoP2: "One-way" means you cannot mathematically calculate backwards from the fingerprint to the number. When you send a new ballot, we create the same fingerprint from your number again — if it matches, we know you've already voted.
about.cryptoQ: But can't you just try all phone numbers?
about.cryptoP3: Good question. Danish mobile numbers are 8 digits — about 100 million combinations. A computer could hash all of them in seconds. That's why we use the salt: without the secret key, you can't recreate the fingerprints. The salt is stored only on the server and never appears in the code or database.
about.cryptoP4: Even if someone gained access to both the database and the salt, they would only learn that a specific phone number voted yes or no. No names, IP addresses, or other personal data is stored alongside the vote.

demands.d1Short: Denmark lazima itambue rasmi dola ya Palestina.
demands.d1Long: Denmark lazima itambue rasmi dola ya Palestina kama dola huru.
demands.d1Detail: 156 of 193 UN member states and 14 EU countries have already recognized Palestine — including Sweden, France, the UK, Spain and Ireland. Denmark remains one of the few Western countries that has not.
demands.d2Title: Simamisha uuzaji wa silaha kwa Israel
demands.d2Short: Denmark lazima isimamishe uuzaji na usafirishaji wote wa silaha na vifaa vya kijeshi kwa Israel.
demands.d2Long: Uuzaji na usafirishaji wote wa silaha na vifaa vya kijeshi kwa Israel lazima usimamishwe.
demands.d2Detail: 15 Danish companies supply parts for the F-35 fighter jet, including Terma, which produces the pylons that carry and release the aircraft's bombs. Denmark has also purchased artillery from Israeli weapons firm Elbit Systems for DKK 1.7 billion — a deal subject to a landmark legal case over its legality.
demands.d3Short: Mifuko ya pensheni na mifuko ya umma ya Denmark lazima iondoe uwekezaji kutoka kwa makampuni yanayofaidika na uvamizi haramu.
demands.d3Long: Mifuko ya pensheni na mifuko ya umma ya Denmark lazima iondoe uwekezaji kutoka kwa makampuni yanayofaidika na uvamizi haramu.
demands.d3Detail: Danish pension funds have invested approx. DKK 5.2 billion in companies on the UN list of businesses with activities in the illegal settlements — from surveillance technology to travel platforms and food production. This includes PFA, Danica, Velliv, and PensionDanmark, which most Danes are tied to through their employer's collective schemes and cannot freely opt out of.

support.title: Msaada
support.subtitle: Tuambie ikiwa kuna tatizo au una pendekezo.

alreadyVoted.question: Already voted?
alreadyVoted.explanation: We don't store phone numbers — only an encrypted fingerprint. We use cookies to remember your vote on your device. Updates can sometimes reset cookies, making it look like you haven't voted. Just send yourself a new ballot — the system allows only one vote per phone number, and you'll immediately see the detailed results.
